user.title: Pellet Grill — Sign In
user.description: Enter the email address associated with your GrillirG account. A verification code will be sent to that address.

otp.title: Enter Verification Code
otp.description: A 6-digit code was sent to {email}. Enter it below.

device.title: Select Your Grill
device.description: Multiple grills found on your account. Select which one to add.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Enter your email to receive a new verification code.

reauth_otp.title: Enter Verification Code
reauth_otp.description: A 6-digit code was sent to {email}. Enter it below.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Pellet Grill service. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid verification code. Request a new one and try again.
error.no_devices: No grills found on this account. Make sure your grill is set up in the GrillirG app first.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for details.

token_near_expiry.title: Pellet Grill: re-authentication needed soon
token_near_expiry.description:
Your Pellet Grill session for **{email}** expires in about **{days} days**. Re-authenticate now to avoid losing connection mid-cook.

Go to **Settings → Devices & Services → Pellet Grill** and select **Reconfigure**.

init.title: Pellet Grill Options
init.description:
**Push alerts (FCM)** receive the same alarm notifications as the official app — pushed instantly when the grill detects a problem, no polling delay.

⚠️ Enabling FCM registers a push token under THIS HA account. If this is the same account your phone uses, the phone will stop receiving Pellet Grill alerts until you reopen the official app.

**Recommended**: configure HA with a separate prime-polaris account that has the grill shared to it (set up via the official app first). Then your phone keeps OEM alerts and HA gets independent pushes.
